extraction.one_line_summary: TRENTIN Matteo won stage 5 sprint after MEZGEC Luca crashed in final 250m taking down half the field including ACKERMANN's leadout.
tactical_patterns: TRENTIN and MEZGEC deliberately sat on Bora-Hansgrohe's leadout train rather than organizing their own, exploiting numerical advantage.
DILLIER won all four KOM climbs from breakaway to secure classification with stage remaining, forcing rivals into energy-wasting chase.
Sky controlled peloton despite having only GC jersey to defend, preventing Astana from isolating MOSCON on climbs.

rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: opened sprint at 200m marker showing tactical awareness to time effort despite being only two-man team
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: positive: Bora-Hansgrohe leadout remained intact until 250m despite having weaker riders latch on, took points jersey
rider_signals.DILLIER Sylvan: positive: possessed superior climbing legs to sweep all four KOMs against dedicated rival ACKHORN who was equally motivated
rider_signals.CHARNETSKI Sergey: negative: Astana unable to create meaningful GC pressure despite trying to make stage difficult for Sky
rider_signals.MEZGEC Luca: negative: initiated crash through clash with ACKERMANN in final 250m, eliminating his own winning opportunity
